(16) '1>[.311. 404(3T), ~ 5 v. 1989 (J7) 'l>f.311. 263(3T), ~ 29l11'1, 1994 ( 18) '1>[.311. 36(3T)' ~ 27 ~. 1999 ;;itt~ '!R ~ ~ 10 ~. 2001 '1ft 3Tf~ ~ 293 ( 3T) <t ];R1 <1'W'trc~ il!;<n lT'l1 I -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY MIJI;l:STRY OF lABOUR AND EMPWYME!I.T (Child Labour Section) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the lOth October, 2006 S.O. 1742(£)-. Whereas the draft of the proposal further to amend the Schedule to the Child Labour (Prohibition and Regulation) Act, 19~6 (61 of 1986) was published, as required by Section 4 of the Child Labour (Prohibition and Regulation) Act, 1986 (61 of19R6), in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section3, Sub·se<:tion (ii) dated lOth July, 2006 under the notification of the Government of India in the ·Ministry of Labour and Employment number S.O. 1029 (E), dated lOth July, 2006 inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby within a period of three months from the date on which copies of the Official Gazette containing th~ said notification were made available to the public; And wh,.:;rcas, the said Gazette was made available to the general public on the lOth July, 2006; And whereas, no objections and suggestions on the said draft notification were received from the general public within the saiJ period of three months; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 4 of !he Child Labour (Prohibition and Regulation) Act. 1986, (61 of1986), the Central Government on the recommendations of the ChiJd Labour Technical Advisory Committee, hereby makes. the following a,mendments further to amend the Schedule to the said Act and directs that they shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette, na,mely :- AMENDMENT In the Schedule to the Child Labour (Prohibition and Regulation) Act, 1986, (6! of 1986), in Part A, under the heading "Occupations" :- after item (13) and the entry relating thereto, the following items and entries shall be added, na,me!y :- "(14) Employment of child as domestic workers or servarits; (15) Employment of children in dhabas (road-side eateries), restaurants, hotels, motels, tea-shops, resorts, spas or other recreational centers". [F. No. S-2701213/97-CL] S. K. SRIVASTAVA, Jt. Sccy. Footnote: The first notification to amend the Schedule was issued vide number S.O. 61dated the 23rd December, 1986 and subsequently the same was amended vide number:- · (16) S.O. 404 (E), dated the 5th June, 1989 (17) S.O. 263 (E), dated the 29th March, 1994 (18) S.O. 36 (E) dated the 27th January, 1999 and last amended vide notification No. 293 (E) dated the 10thMay2001.
